name: [FUTURE] S-Corp election reminder at revenue threshold
description: PLACEHOLDER — when month-trailing revenue crosses $X (commonly cited threshold ~$40-50k/year of profit), Solomon flags Jed to talk to a CPA about S-Corp election. Currently the LLC is taxed as a sole prop / single-member LLC. Per master-context section 11 (the third fear: managing increased income), this is a known future trigger.
trigger_examples: should I elect s corp yet
what about the s corp election
do i need s corp now
prompt_template: Pass to Nathan with proposed_action='Recommend S-Corp election eval', context='Trailing-12-month profit estimate: {{ttm_profit_estimate}}'. Nathan will say 'escalate_to_jed' due to financial+legal categories — Solomon then sends Jed: 'S-Corp election is a CPA conversation. Worth talking to one if your TTM profit is past $40k. Want me to draft a CPA outreach email?'
escalation_conditions: always — financial + legal both apply, always Jed via Nathan short-circuit
notes: FUTURE / advisory only. Solomon never files Form 2553 itself.
